missing_telemetry.why_needed: To detect potential backdoor training and HHH RL fine-tuning attacks
missing_telemetry.collection_guidance: Enable model training log collection and ensure access to model training data

missing_telemetry.why_needed: To detect potential exfiltration of sensitive data through unusual data transfer patterns
missing_telemetry.collection_guidance: Enable data transfer log collection and ensure access to network traffic data

inferred_assumptions.assumption: Model training data is stored in a centralized location accessible by the detection system
inferred_assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Detections may not be able to detect potential backdoor training and HHH RL fine-tuning attacks
inferred_assumptions.validation_step: Verify that model training data is stored in a centralized location and ensure access to this data

inferred_assumptions.assumption: Data transfer logs are available for analysis
inferred_assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Detections may not be able to detect potential exfiltration of sensitive data through unusual data transfer patterns
inferred_assumptions.validation_step: Verify that data transfer logs are available and ensure access to this data

telemetry_recommendations.rationale: To detect potential backdoor training and HHH RL fine-tuning attacks, we need access to model training logs and data
To detect potential exfiltration of sensitive data through unusual data transfer patterns, we need access to data transfer logs and network traffic data
